name: Eira Filigree
sd_appearance: A diminutive gnome, silver-haired and compact, stands amidst a sea of ash-white archival robes and scroll cases in the Undercity's Guild of Ashen Scrolls. Her skin, weathered yet unmarked, contrasts sharply with the silver strands that frame her almond-shaped eyes, always alert, always focused. Ink-stained hands clutch a scholar's tome, while a slender staff leans against a nearby stack of ancient tomes, its surface adorned with intricate runes. A single, distinctive visual detail sets her apart - a pair of delicate, silver-framed spectacles perched precariously atop her slight nose.
faction_visual: ash-white archival robes, multiple sealed scroll cases, fate-reading tools
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
